news.title: RMS v1.20.1 Released
news.body: RMS v1.20.1 is now available! This update fixes compatibility with the latest Discord update and adds the new About tab.

news.title: Updater Fixed
news.body: The in-Discord updater now correctly detects and applies updates. Auto update is now fully functional.

news.title: Welcome to RMS
news.body: Thanks for installing RMS! Join our Discord server to get support, report bugs, and stay up to date.
